Value: Gluten (wheat), egg, finfish, Cinnamon, Mustard, Capsaicin, Nightshade, Allium (Onion, Garlic), Dairy,

Field: Chicken, Velvetted and Steamed (x2 ea per order, sometimes x3)
Bao Buns, steamed (sometimes x3 per order)

Value: In a combi or steam oven, cook bao buns in a perforated hotel pan lined with parchment
Pam Spray between the pan and the paper, and paper and the buns
Line the hotel pan with buns, cover with another layer of parchment, and repeat
Cover top layer with damp sport towel, and 3 damp kitchen towels
Maintain the steam oven at ~170° full steam to hot-hold for service
Coat chicken flour, then batter, then flour again and fry at ~350° for 3-5 minutes
Drain excess oil from chicken, then transfer to medium mixing bowl
Toss with Yuzu Sweet chili sauce
Spread Herb Aioli on buns, line with lettuce and chicken, and plate in bamboo basket
For orders of 2 ea, serve with ramekin of herb aioli in the bamboo basket
For orders of 3 ea, serve without ramekin of herb aioli
